memoryArtifacts.headline: Urse d'Abitot, showing the bear cognizance shield, frieze at Worcester. Picture by Rev. Daniel Washburn Jones on 2 July 2017.
Holt Castle. The entry gateway is original and led into the Great Hall. Big windows indicate it was designed to impress, rather than defend.
The Château de Tancarville in Normandy. Urse was a tenant of the lords of Tancarville.
Building a motte, from the Bayeux Tapestry
Bear and Ragged Staff heraldic motif of Earls of Warwick, believed to refer to the descent of the Beauchamp family from Urse de Arbitot.

popularStory.headline: Urse d'Abetot (c. 1040-1108)
popularStory.description: Urse d'Abetot (c. 1040-1108) was a Norman as well as a medieval Sheriff of Worcestershire and royal official under Kings William I, William II and Henry I. He was a native of Normandy and moved to Eng …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Urse d'Abetot於1040年出生在法國諾門迪時，他的父親Almeric d'Abitot - 1st Baron de Salwarpe, Viscount de Worcestershire, Châtelain de Worcester et Constable in the King's Household26歲，母親Agnes de Ponthieu19歲。他於1068年之前與Athelisa de Normandy在英國武斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1075年登記服兵役。他於1069年在英國武斯特斯爾伍斯特被列為castilian of worcester castle。他去世於1108年在英國武斯特斯爾享年68歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾伍斯特 聖 瑪麗。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Urse d'Abetot于1040年出生在法国諾門迪时，他的父亲Almeric d'Abitot - 1st Baron de Salwarpe, Viscount de Worcestershire, Châtelain de Worcester et Constable in the King's Household26岁，母亲Agnes de Ponthieu19岁。他于1068年之前与Athelisa de Normandy在英国武斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1075年登记服兵役。他于1069年在英国武斯特斯爾伍斯特被列为castilian of worcester castle。他去世于1108年在英国武斯特斯爾享年68岁，埋葬在英国武斯特斯爾伍斯特 聖 瑪麗。

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Urse d'Abetot was born in 1040, in Normandy, France, his father, Almeric d'Abitot - 1st Baron de Salwarpe, Viscount de Worcestershire, Châtelain de Worcester et Constable in the King's Household, was 26 and his mother, Agnes de Ponthieu, was 19. He married Athelisa de Normandy before 1068, in Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1075. In 1069, his occupation is listed as castilian of worcester castle in Worcester, Worcestershire, England. He died in 1108, in Worcestershire, England, at the age of 68, and was buried in Worcester St Mary, Worcestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Urse d'Abetot est né en 1040, à Normandie, France, son père, Almeric d'Abitot - 1st Baron de Salwarpe, Viscount de Worcestershire, Châtelain de Worcester et Constable in the King's Household, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Ponthieu, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Athelisa de Normandy avant 1068, à Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1075. En 1069, sa profession de son indiquée est castilian of worcester castle à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1108, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Worcester St Mary, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Urse d'Abetot 1040 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Almeric d'Abitot - 1st Baron de Salwarpe, Viscount de Worcestershire, Châtelain de Worcester et Constable in the King's Household 26 und seine Mutter Agnes de Ponthieu 19. Er hat vor 1068 in Worcestershire, England Athelisa de Normandy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1075 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1069 ist sein Beruf als castilian of worcester castle in Worcester, Worcestershire, England aufgeführt. Er starb 1108 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Worcestershire, England und wurde in Worcester St Mary, Worcestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Urse d'Abetot è nato il nel 1040 nel Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Almeric d'Abitot - 1st Baron de Salwarpe, Viscount de Worcestershire, Châtelain de Worcester et Constable in the King's Household, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Ponthieu, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Athelisa de Normandy prima del 1068, nel Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1075. Nel 1069, la sua occupazione è indicata come castilian of worcester castle nel Worcester, Worcestershire, England. Morì nel 1108, nel Worcestershire, England, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Worcester St Mary, Worcestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Urse d'Abetotが1040年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Almeric d'Abitot - 1st Baron de Salwarpe, Viscount de Worcestershire, Châtelain de Worcester et Constable in the King's Householdは26歳，母Agnes de Ponthieuは19歳であった。1068年以前にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアでAthelisa de Normandyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1075年に兵役登録をした。1069年，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターでの職業はcastilian of worcester castleと記録されている。彼は1108年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアで68歳で死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスター スト マリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Urse d'Abetot(이)가 1040년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Almeric d'Abitot - 1st Baron de Salwarpe, Viscount de Worcestershire, Châtelain de Worcester et Constable in the King's Household(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Ponthieu(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1068년 이전 영국 워스스터실르에서 Athelisa de Normandy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1075년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1069년, 그의 직업은 영국 워스스터실르 워스스터에서 castilian of worcester castle이었다. 그는 1108년 영국 워스스터실르에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 워스스터 스트 메리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Urse d'Abetot nasceu em 1040, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Almeric d'Abitot - 1st Baron de Salwarpe, Viscount de Worcestershire, Châtelain de Worcester et Constable in the King's Household, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Ponthieu, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Athelisa de Normandy antes 1068, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1075. Em 1069, sua profissão aparece como castilian of worcester castle em Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1108, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Worcester St Mary, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Urse d'Abetot родился в 1040 г. в местности норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Almeric d'Abitot - 1st Baron de Salwarpe, Viscount de Worcestershire, Châtelain de Worcester et Constable in the King's Household было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Ponthieu, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Athelisa de Normandy перед 1068 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. В 1075 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1069 годуработал по профессии castilian of worcester castle в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия. Он умер в 1108 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности ворсестир ст мэри, ворсестиршир, Англия.

sm.from about 1066 to 1108: mai le e tusa o le 1066 e o'o I le 1108
sm.from about 1069 to 1108: mai le e tusa o le 1069 e o'o I le 1108

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Urse d'Abetot nació en 1040, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Almeric d'Abitot - 1st Baron de Salwarpe, Viscount de Worcestershire, Châtelain de Worcester et Constable in the King's Household, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Agnes de Ponthieu, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Athelisa de Normandy antes de 1068, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1075. En 1069, su ocupación registrada era castilian of worcester castle en Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Murió en 1108, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Worcester St Mary, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.
